markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to PagerDuty and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PagerDuty is actively exploring AEO (AI Engine Optimization) strategies and tools like Athena and Profound to track and identify opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation services, combining automation with human expertise to produce high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [PagerDuty may be interested in short-term content production support, with potential for expanded collaboration if initial engagement proves valuable](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Topics

### PagerDuty's Current AEO Efforts

  - [Tracking AEO manually but looking to scale up reporting and tactics](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Focusing on top-of-funnel queries and discoverable content](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Aiming to connect AEO efforts to business outcomes for leadership](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Creating 2-3 AI-assisted prompts per day, with content written by a contractor](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### PagerDuty's Content Creation Process

  - [90% of content created internally, 10% outsourced](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [SEO team, PMMs, and occasional brand/PR teams contribute](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Exploring AI tools (Claude, Profound, Athena) to accelerate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Considering involvement of DevRel and PR teams in AEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered agency model delivering "services as software"](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint (30K) followed by ongoing growth execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Comprehensive process from strategy to content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Ability to create and refresh large volumes of content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Tracking and improving AEO/SEO metrics using tools like Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Short-term focus on content production support](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Possible assistance with tracking and reporting AEO/SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Potential for expanded scope if initial engagement proves successful](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to discuss potential collaboration with his partner (Adam) and team](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [GrowthX to send use cases and examples of work with similar teams](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with Kyle (from PagerDuty) and broader team if interest persists](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Sam to consider the viability of the 8-week strategy sprint as an initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/y5tkcayHfxNgEJ-UWFboXyx2JxJrXp9Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
